title: The Baffling Bank Job of 1972

scenes.text: A daring bank robbery shocked a nation, yet the robbers vanished.
It happened in London, at the Baker Street Bank.
In 1972, a well-planned heist stole over 200,000 pounds.
The case remains unsolved, with no leads after all these years.
Despite extensive investigations, the robbers were never apprehended.
scenes.label: NEVER APPREHENDED

scenes.text: Follow for daily true crime mysteries.

description: 📍 London, UK - 1972. A bank heist led to the theft of over 200,000 pounds, and the case remains unsolved. Follow for daily cold cases!
